_comment: What the extractor should produce for examples/sample_fathom_transcript.json. Useful as a fixture for tests and for tuning the prompt without burning Claude calls.

call.title: Target Darts — DE paid search review

summary_bullets: Rolling out the new hero variant across DE paid search this week — Lukas owns German copy sign-off by Friday.
Launching a 2-week vernacular keyword test on May 1 with €15k initial budget; scale-up gated on +20% CTR at midpoint, hard ceiling at €40k.
Austria expansion parked until June — DE work has to land first.

decisions.summary: Roll out new hero variant across DE paid search this week.
Park Austria expansion until June; focus on DE first.

commitments.summary: Lukas will sign off on the German hero copy by Friday.
Chris will check with legal counsel on prize-claim language and respond tomorrow.

experiments.name: de-vernacular-keyword-test
experiments.hypothesis: Bidding on German vernacular search terms (under-served in current setup) will lift CTR by 20%+.

workstreams.name: paid-search-de
workstreams.status: active — hero rollout + vernacular test launching
workstreams.key_update: CPA up 14% WoW on brand terms; new hero +23% CR in test cohort; rolling out across DE.

workstreams.name: geo-expansion
workstreams.key_update: Austria expansion explicitly parked until DE work lands.

performance_signals.note: Primarily on brand terms; new Winmau entrant suspected driver.
Conversion rate held; click drop is the concern.

open_questions.question: Do we have legal sign-off on the new creative's prize-claim language?
